steps.action: Verify CSV template formats section with example rows
steps.expected: Opening balance CSV template with headers, field rules, and example rows; Opening stock CSV template with headers, field rules, and example rows
steps.observed: Section 1.1 documents Opening Balance CSV (POST /api/v1/accounting/opening-balances) with required header row, field-by-field rules table, row validation rules, file-level validation, and a 4-row balanced example. Section 1.2 documents Opening Stock CSV (POST /api/v1/inventory/opening-stock) with recommended header, accepted column aliases, field rules, and a 3-row example with RAW_MATERIAL and FINISHED_GOOD rows.

steps.expected: Step-by-step instructions for exporting from Tally Prime and uploading to ERP
steps.observed: Section 2 covers: 2.1 Prepare company period in Tally Prime (Alt+F2), 2.2 Export ledger masters as XML (Alt+E, Format=XML), 2.3 Export opening vouchers as XML, 2.4 Upload into BigBright ERP with curl example. Also includes Tally group to ERP AccountType mapping table (25 group mappings).

steps.expected: Tally group to ERP account type mapping table
steps.observed: Section 3 provides complete mapping reference with 25 Tally groups (SUNDRY DEBTORS -> ASSET, SUNDRY CREDITORS -> LIABILITY, BANK ACCOUNTS -> ASSET, etc.) and unmapped group handling instructions.

steps.expected: Error patterns, meanings, and fix instructions for all three import types
steps.observed: Section 4 covers: 4.1 Opening balance CSV errors (10 error patterns), 4.2 Opening stock CSV errors (10 error patterns), 4.3 Tally XML import errors (6 response field/error patterns), 4.4 Partial success behavior (row-level failures, valid row processing, idempotency).

steps.expected: End-to-end migration workflow from company creation to go-live
steps.observed: Section 5 provides 6 steps: Step 1 Create tenant/company with CoA template (with JSON example), Step 2 Import opening balances, Step 3 Import opening stock, Step 4 Import from Tally XML (optional), Step 5 Verify trial balance, Step 6 Go-live checklist with 7 verification items.

sections: 1) CSV Template Formats (with Example Rows) - 1.1 Opening Balance CSV, 1.2 Opening Stock CSV
2) Tally Prime Export Instructions (for XML import) - 2.1-2.4 export and upload steps
3) Tally Group → ERP Account Type Mapping Reference - 25 group mappings
4) Error Handling Guide - 4.1 Balance errors, 4.2 Stock errors, 4.3 Tally errors, 4.4 Partial success
5) Step-by-Step Onboarding Workflow - 6 steps from tenant creation to go-live

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-MIG-001 validated via 9 tests (OpeningBalanceImportServiceTest 6/6, controller+security 3/3) confirming balanced CSV journal creation, unbalanced rejection, idempotency, and admin-only access. VAL-MIG-002 validated via 9 tests (OpeningStockImportServiceTest 5/5, controller 3/3, OpeningStockPostingRegressionIT 1/1) confirming mixed RM+FG processing, batch creation, journal posting, duplicate SKU handling, and idempotency. VAL-MIG-003 validated via 7 tests (TallyImportServiceTest 4/4, controller+security 3/3) confirming Tally XML parsing, ledger-to-account mapping, unmapped group/item reporting, and idempotency. VAL-MIG-004 validated via file existence and content review of docs/migration-guide.md covering all required sections: CSV templates with examples, Tally export instructions, field mapping rules, error handling, and onboarding workflow.
